page: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 512.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. For local storage, the instance is equipped with 3780 GB of local NVMe SSD capacity and supports Premium Storage. No dedicated GPU hardware is included in this configuration.

Benchmark results indicate strong performance characteristics across memory and multi-threaded compute operations. The instance achieves a strong read-only memory bandwidth of 4509.39 GB/sec for small cached blocks and 246.15 GB/sec for large uncached blocks. Multi-threaded processing capabilities are highlighted by a strong Geekbench multi-core score of 16820.0 and a strong Passmark CPU score of 72789.57. The processor's advanced instruction support, including AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX), contributes to strong performance in specialized tasks, such as Passmark CPU extended instructions and encryption tests. Additionally, the server demonstrates strong database capabilities, executing 84.54 million Redis SET operations per second and scoring strongly in Passmark database operations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the E64ds_v6 offers a balanced resource density for workloads requiring substantial memory capacity alongside high-speed local storage without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of 512.0 GB of RAM, a 4.2 GHz Intel Xeon processor, and 3780 GB of local storage makes this instance highly suitable for memory-intensive and data-heavy applications. Appropriate workloads include large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise resource planning (ERP) systems, data analytics, and multi-threaded software compilation.
description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 32 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor running at 4.2 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It is configured with 512.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3780 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capabilities. The instance delivers strong performance in multi-threaded benchmarks, memory bandwidth, and database operations, as evidenced by a strong Passmark CPU score of 72789.57 and 84.54 million Redis SET operations per second. It also supports advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. This server is designed for memory-intensive and data-heavy enterprise workloads, making it highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores, and complex data analytics pipelines.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v6 is a memory-optimized instance with 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage, delivering strong database and multi-threaded compute performance.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E64ds_v6 is a memory-optimized instance featuring 64 vCPUs, 512 GB RAM, and 3780 GB local storage for demanding database workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and fast local storage for demanding database and analytical workloads.
bullet_points: 64 dedicated vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8573C processor at 4.2 GHz.
512.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB of RAM per core.
3780 GB of high-speed local storage with Premium Storage support.
Strong multi-threaded performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks.
Intel AMX and AVX-512 instruction support for accelerated vector and matrix operations.
Best suited for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
